reviews.review_description: My favorite game! Very well designed and programmed.  It offers a great variety of options to employ different strategies.  It’s very entertaining.  I hope the developers keep the series coming. I’d love to see a Salvation 2.

Super game , À pity that only 30 missions exist . To me it’s not diccult’for
Me with AI now to generate other missions even out of the story, scénario…

reviews.review_title: So addicting but in a good way
reviews.review_description: This game is so much fun, much more than I thought it would be when I bought it.
Fun and addictive. Great tower defense game.

26.03.30 

You asked me to give you a screenshot separately on Discord, so I tried to send it, but I got a discord error when authenticating my phone number. So I would appreciate it if there was a way to unauthenticate it. In the case of other Discord, you can write without authenticating your phone number.
I'll change the score back to five.

Before
It's a little bit more fun compared to the first version!
There is only English in the game, but I requested it to be translated into Korean in the first version, so I'm thrilled that this version was also applied. I've given you feedback before, but why isn't there multi in this best defense game? If you make a DLC or a multi-version, people will go crazy
Cooperative version and PVP version. This is a real way to make money.
I'm definitely going to buy it when it comes out. Please add multiplayer to this game! It's the best complete version ever.
Four people would be the best.

You can see it quickly if you see it as a one-star rating, so I'll set it as a one-star rating first and change it to a five-star rating right away if you give me an answer.
Oh, and there is a phenomenon that Hangul breaks when upgrading the turret. There is no big problem, but I would appreciate it if you could refer to that in advance.

developer_response.body:
Hi, please try again , we changed some settings on discord hopefully it should work now without the authentication 

----------
Hi, thanks for the review. Glad you’re enjoying the sequel and the Korean language support.

Yeah, we hear you on multiplayer. It’s something we’ve talked about a lot with the community on Discord -- please  join us: https://xlabdigital.com/discord 

We’d love to do co-op/PvP and even things like a level editor, but right now we need a bigger player base to make those modes really work. It’s definitely on our minds though.

Also appreciate you pointing out the Hangul issue when upgrading turrets, we’ll look into that and push a fix out. If you can send us a quick video or steps, that’d help a lot info@xlabdigital.com

Thanks again for the support 🙏

reviews.review_description: I already loved the first edition of this game and the new one is even better. If you like Tower Defense or/and immersive games, check it out.

developer_response.body: Thank you for the kind review, definitely helps small teams like ours, especially when players enjoy the game and share. Happy gaming!!

reviews.review_description: All works like it should, it got a bit hard. I never completed it. I'll go back to it one day

developer_response.body:
Thank you. New update coming in a few weeks with some more balance options . 
Happy gaming!

reviews.review_title: Addictive Tower Defense Fun in VR
reviews.review_description:
I've never been a big tower defense player, but Iron Guard: Salvation changed that. This is my first tower defense game, and I'm having a blast. The gameplay is easy to learn but hard to put down, and I keep finding myself saying, "Just one more round."

The graphics look great on the Meta Quest 3, and the VR immersion adds a whole new level of fun to the genre. Building defenses, managing resources, and fighting off waves of enemies
feels rewarding and engaging.

If you're looking for an addictive VR strategy game with solid gameplay and great visuals, I highly recommend Iron Guard: Salvation.

Love this game. So much fun. Gone through it twice now and only sorry that I've now beaten it on every difficulty (Hard was real challenge). If you are on the fence on whether to buy it and play it, get off the fence and just buy it. Crossing my fingers for a 3rd iteration soon.

well the Iron guard was spot on 5 stars for that l love it . but this is not as good!!trying to read the upgrade for gun's it white when click on it. so small    and not clear as the first one. ever the gun in hand is a bit slow now . BUT after playing it more l play better it is just a few thing that l do not understand when do mission's so Discord as help me so that great.
so 4 star for now but it just the upgrade for the weapons it in white hard to read could be bit clear :)

developer_response.body:
Hi, thanks for the feedback, we appreciate you taking the time to share it.

Regarding the drone, you can purchase upgrades for it and also activate auto-shooting mode, which should help with pacing. If anything feels slower than expected, we’d love to understand your setup so we can look into it.

This is the first time we’ve heard about the upgrade text being small,, we’ll review it internally.

If you’re open to it, please join our Discord https://xlabdigital.com/discord .  Our dev team is active there and happy to help with any specific questions or issues.

Thanks again for playing and for the feedback.

reviews.review_description:
I keep replaying this and the original Iron Guard game. This version has changeable difficulty settings which is a game changer (pun intended) and turret positions can be changed, amongst other improvements.

Early annoyances with the interface and the annoying move back message when moving to the edge of the map were resolved very quickly. 

The price remains very competitive too. 

I wish is there were some add-on content; would love some extra missions - doesn't really need any further game modes, just more variations of the same.

It would also be nice to see your list of achievements (please let me know if I've missed this) and view a gallery of the enemies with their strengths and weaknesses. 

Oh and I would gladly pay extra for a level editor to make my own custom missions with configurable paths, scenery, turret placements, enemy types and win criteria.

Please make it so!

developer_response.body:
Hi, thanks for the kind feedback. Yes "achievements" UI is coming in the next patch (very very soon) along with many other goodies 😊.
We definitely have future plans for level editor and other additions like coop , just need players to request and give more feedback and priorities, so we can plan and understand the demand  🙏
Happy gaming!

reviews.review_description: If you liked the first you’ll like the sequel. Same vibes but with extra bits. A+

reviews.review_title: A tower defense game, if not THE TD-Game
reviews.review_description:
So far, I really like it; it seems like a worthy successor to the first Iron Guard.

However: did I miss the explanation  how to activate the automatic drone? I only managed to activate it by randomly pressing some buttons. Somehow the drone then switched to another hand and I was unable to change it. I've figured it out now : Gripbutton, actually easy.

Despite it, It would be great if something like this were explained in the upgrade menu (not only what it does, but also how and which key to press).

Ok, i´m in lvl 8 now, I'm confident that the game will continue to be as fun as usual. Hope the devs have plans for Iron Guard 3.

developer_response.body:
Hi, glad you're enjoying the game. The  "automatic drone"  control is in the Settings menu, press Controls to see the mappings on your controller. Also the explanation I think is displayed in one of the hints . Hope this helps. 
Happy gaming!

reviews.review_title: Very good! much better then first one
reviews.review_description:
Nice graphics

good gameplay

tactical thinking
A great follow on game to the first one. New dimensions to the game really add to the possibilities of how to win each level. My favorite game without a doubt.
When i started to play this i didn't think would like it. The more i played the more addictive it became. Highly recommended!!

Decent TD game. Best I've played in VR. Stage 5 is a massive difficulty spike and after you clear it every stage after is a breeze by comparison. Odds are incredibly high that you won't 3 star it and will just have to come back to it later with more upgrades and the third hero. That stage really feels like it was designed with max upgrades in mind. So don't feel bad if you don't 3 star the first clear.

developer_response.body:
Hi, level 5 is a different game mode - it's resource collecting mode where players balance between collecting the target resource displayed on the screen and building turrets for defenses.  Please read the pop-up hint at the start of the level or make sure the "tutorial hints " is on, under settings if you want to see the pop-up again for all the details.  
Best!

reviews.review_description:
Great! I loved the first game, and now the second one comes with minor tweaks and improvements. The game offers 30 missions for an unbeatably low price. The visuals and sound are extremely good, and the gameplay is incredibly addictive. I've been playing for almost four hours now, and the battery is unfortunately dead. Unfortunately, the settings aren't optimized yet, and you can't adjust the language, rotation, or vignette. This was very annoying at first, as the snap and motion vignette are very annoying and constantly on. Please fix this urgently.
Additionally, nothing is selectable from a distance, and you always have to get very close. It's also annoying that the menu stays open over a build platform, making it impossible to move it. To do so, you have to awkwardly click somewhere else. This can quickly become frustrating in critical situations.

developer_response.body:
Update: pls update to most recent patch, most issues if not all should be resolved. Thank you.

Hi, thank you for the feedback and support! We’re already working on a settings patch (language, rotation, vignette) that will be out soon. I’ll also bring up the persistent menu and distance selection with the devs, we want to get the balance right for everyone. Best!

reviews.review_description: I really disliked the one mission where you have to start collecting resources. It honestly ruined the momentum of the game. I tried seven times to beat it and I honestly don’t know what to do. I will eventually reinstall this.

developer_response.body:
Hi, sorry to hear this, which level was this in, as there are few levels 5, 22, etc with the resource collection mode if I recall correctly. Please join us on discord and our devs and player community would be super happy to help. https://xlabdigital.com/discord
Hope we can help you enjoy and finish the game. Best!

reviews.review_description:
How have they made what was a great game into this. A good point is the ability to place the turret platforms where you want them is great - however the ease at which you can accidentally sell the tower just by accidentally firing at a turret during the heat of battle is ridiculous. 
A few times during game play I was shooting and tracking invaders from a distance, hit the bottom of a tower a couple of times and bang it's sold!! Just when you need it most! 
This to me is a massive flaw in game play and ruins the flow of the game. You should not be able to 'sell' a tower by accident. 
Apart from the above I think serious flaw everything else is brilliant no too different from the first game. L ovely scenery nice upgraded drone.   Playing on medium setting it is challenging. 

UPDATE!  The developers quickly fixed the problems mentioned above, the accidental turret selling has been fixed and backing out of the play area doesn't land you in darkness. So I too have restored the stars the game deserves. So now its a 5 star rating from me.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your patience and support.  We'll continue to make the experience better.

reviews.review_description: One of the best Tower defend games in VR. It has a story, a lot of missions, many upgrades, beatiful scene and effect, a fun rock soundtrack

The first VR game I played was Iron Guard on PCVR and loved it.  Tower Defense is my favorite genre and being able to move around the field maximizes the experience.  Not a fan of games that just create a virtual board game in front of you but this is not one of them.  The story is good enough with solid voice acting.  The graphics are improved across the board.  Game play is well balanced with lots of upgrades and more options than the first one.  Only complaint is at least one bug left, where picking up the bombs sometimes disappear or fly off into space.  And of course more levels are always welcome.  5+ stars on this one.

developer_response.body:
Hi, glad to hear you enjoyed both the games.  Thank you.
p.s: The bomb issue will be fixed in the next patch.

reviews.review_description:
The performance on XR2(+) Gen1 HMDs (Quest 2, Quest Pro) is so poor, I have never seen anything like this. In VR, a constant framerate is critical, otherwise you don't see clearly in motion, have judder and double images and you can get sick from that. The framerate is cut in half nearly all the time WITHOUT motion reprojection (Application Spacewarp), and often it goes below 30 fps, sometimes in the low twenties. The performance was so poor that I had to switch from my Quest Pro, where I originally installed it, to the Quest 3, where performance is better. However, even with the Quest Games Optimizer (which helps) and the GPU set to 690 MHz on Quest 3, it doesn't maintain a constant 72 FPS, and this is on the lower, default Quest 3 resolution. It still drops regularly. This game doesn't look good enough to justify this lack of performance in any way.

Besides the performance issue and the lack of Application Spacewarp, the gameplay is fine most of the time. It is a good tower defense game, and I played through it on easy and medium. Sadly, there are also some bugs, like barrels vanishing in the snow, bosses bugging out, control problems, shooting carts/barrels inside a bulk of enemies, towers that like to shoot at walls sometimes, and a nasty difficulty spike in an early mission and with one boss (if the boss does not bug out). It is also annoying, that the next round starts automatically. It is ok to give players a bonus, that start the next round early but don't start it automatically, when the short timer runs down. I want to think between the rounds, where I adjust my tower setup.

If they fix the poor performance, I will give it a much higher rating. But in its current state, I cannot recommend it for XR2 Gen 1 HMDs at all, it is just a blurry and juddery mess in motion. It might be acceptable for XR2 Gen 2 HMDs if you can tolerate drops and some judder and you can further stabilize it with something like Quest Games Optimizer (QGO).

developer_response.body:
Thanks for the feedback and for playing!
I’ll share your notes with the dev team so we can discuss internally and review further.  I appreciate the suggestion regarding Spacewarp and will check with the programmers.
If you’d like to help report bugs or share more feedback, please join us on Discord at https://xlabdigital.com/discord ,  upcoming patches should address several  issues.
Best!

reviews.review_description:
Very well built tower defense game. You can see the developers  being inspired by older RTS titles. I love how the progression goes, and the freedom of deciding what you can upgrade between missions. The art style and music is excellent, and most importantly, it doesn't feel buggy.

One thing I would like is to have maybe badges that indicates which difficulty you've completed. Just to have a reason to complete them other than highscores.

Edit: Oh also, I like how simple it is. Myself not being too good a tower defense games, this one doesn't feel overwhelming at all. Everything is introduced at a very good pacing.

developer_response.body:
Update: recent patch has difficulty indicator based on 3 stars earned in the missions map,  enjoy!

Great idea for badges , we will discuss this further internally . 
happy gaming !

reviews.review_description: Loved the first version & this one is even better. Such a phenomenal game.

developer_response.body: Thank you for the kind review. Best!

reviews.review_description:
As a fan of the first version, this one is a welcome improvement. It brings lots of new and interesting things to the mix  that help give it a new feel while still looking and feeling like the series did.

My fave new thing is the added strategy in placing turrets in the best spots, you only have so many spots and so many turrets and some maps require a bit of thought to pass in this regard.

I also love the bigger skill tree, the Heroes, and the wicked OP tower upgrades that become available. The new view options for zooming in or out are a nice touch. And the new environments are really nice too. They put a lot of bits and bobs around to make each map feel and look like it's a place and not just barren with a few bits.

I'd reeeeally like to see a "are you sure" or something to stop you from accidentally selling turrets. And the icons in the popup upgrade menu are a bit hard to see contrast and size wise. I have had a few chugging moments when the screen got super full, but I have a feeling all of this is coming in a patch soon enough. 

If you like tower defense, this ticks the boxes. :D

I have no idea how much time I have in the first Iron Guard, I found it via gamertagvr a few months back maybe and here I am playing the followup. Pow! :D

developer_response.body:
Hello, thank for for the wonderful review. 

We will have an update very soon for the "accidentally selling" , that mainly stems from the shooting mechanics which has changed in Salvation where you can hold the trigger instead of doing single shots like in the first game. Nevertheless we have a solution and I think you will like that as it will fix the issue.  Also, yes, the upgrade menu icon size is being adjusted so it should help. 

Not sure I understood this issue " I have had a few chugging moments when the screen got super full" , could you please email us a screenshot or join us on discord  with more details https://discord.gg/YKhY3ewTfT  and our devs can help . 
Best ,

reviews.review_description: I loved the first one & this one is even better. Enjoying the story, the pacing of the game, the graphics & the effects. Good tech ladder & lots of fun. Better than what i wished for. I just can't seem to figure out how to repair the buildings. Able to restart the factories but the buildings are mystery.  In my opinion this is a REALLY GREAT GAME. I do hope they add DLC in time, as i don't want the experience to end.

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much,  we’re really glad to hear you enjoyed both titles! 🙏🙏🙏

Factories produce resources and get highlighted at the base, just like abandoned/old Boss turrets or certain  blue or yellow crystals that can be captured/mined by the harvester. I’m not sure which specific repair building you’re referring to, but if it doesn’t have any interactive indicators, then it’s most likely just a prop and can’t be activated or interacted with. 😊

Feel free to join us on Discord to share a screenshot or discuss strategies, etc  with the devs and other players.    https://xlabdigital.com/discord 

Best,

reviews.review_title: A very good game with lots of fun.
reviews.review_description: There are useful and well-thought-out enhancements compared to the first part. The towers are also much more balanced. A clear recommendation to buy. The only downside is that there is no endless mode yet. This somewhat reduces the replayability after you've completed the campaign. Furthermore, it's sometimes pointless to play for high scores, as “inefficiency” is rewarded. However, this is not a disadvantage that detracts from the fun of the game.

developer_response.body:
Hi, thank you for the feedback and kind review. Glad to hear you’re enjoying the game! We definitely have plans and want to add an endless mode and co-op options in the future, all depending on player demand and the popularity of the title. Thanks again for your support!
Best!

reviews.review_description:
I loved the original, but when in flight, I seemed to, for some reason, teleport all over the place when using the left control stick,which should only move users around the game area. 

The right control stick is the teleport control/ turn. This, too, can also be very frustrating to use, as it's too easy to accidentally teleport all over the place when turning in flight. 

Fix the accidental teleport issues, and I would happily change the rating to 5 stars. 

To have Teleport and Turn on the same right control stick is annoying. My advice would be to get rid of the teleport feature altogether because I don't see the need for it...

Update!!! I now appreciate the game much more now that you have fixed any initial glitches... I've now changed my star rating to a well-deserved 5 stars!!!

developer_response.body:
Thank you for the feedback and kind review. We love hearing back from our players and appreciate the feedback to make the game better. 
Cheers!

reviews.review_description: Loved the original Iron Guard, and love this one too. Just sufficiently different from the first to rekindle interest, whilst retaining what made the original great

developer_response.body:
Thank you, much appreciated . 
Best!

reviews.review_description:
Man I don't care what nobody says , this game is a great sequel to the first, keeps me engaged , continuous action, everything works right, looks good and is Amazing fun. Also I had ABSOLUTELY NO BUGS. 

The people saying they sell things by accident are casual , non technical and sometimes young gamers who simply always need friendlier mechanics . I got to level 9 and didn't sell anything by accident, maybe I'm more watchful who knows.  Someone else wrote a long review about this game falling short,  I honestly believe those are competitors of yours because this game is being kept,  NEVER REFUNDING. THANKS FOR THIS AMAZING GAME 🎮🎯. FINALLY USING MY QUEST FOR LONGER THEN 20 MINUTES NOW LOL

WISH IT HAD MULTIPLAYER,  STILL  5 STARz tho⭐ ⭐⭐⭐⭐

developer_response.body:
Thank you for the kind words. Yes, the shooting mechanics in Salvation was changed from the original game, so you can hold trigger and shoot constantly unlike it's predecessor which was single click shooting. 
We have however updated this mechanism in latest patch v0.840 , so drone cannot select turrets, only controller hands can, which should help. 
Thank you again for the kind review, you're a pro. 
Happy gaming !

reviews.review_description:
Love the IRON Guard 1 & 2.  The second one has a nice addition of mobile unit .  A difficulty level adjust is nice.  The Skill point system is a little too generous.  

Classic TD game with the 5 usual (upgradable)Towers.  One or 2 additional towers would be nice. 

Music is very good.  Love it.  

I know the price point would change but it would very nice to be able to shoot the tower from first person perpective (like in Toonhead) And even cooler,  play the mobile unit (like Irina) in first person.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for the kind review and feedback, will share the same with the devs.
Best.

reviews.review_description: Graphic is superb, size, scaling and animation is great, it just fits. I am very satisfied with background music, suspense is way better than a rock or hardrock. Difficulty about right not to easy not to hard on easy level :). The only improvement I can suggest is the new mode right about campaign, jump into the action could be 3 or 4 maps with never ending waves of enemy robots coming to attack a base. That would be lovely. edited PS. Level 20th stasis turret might prevent tank to shot the base otherwise it is impossible to finish it with 3 stars on easy level or I miss something.

developer_response.body:
Hi , thanks for your support and feedback. "Endless" mode would be a good addition like in the first IRON GUARD game, will share this with the devs. 
About level 20, did you shoot at the "shield tower" near the base when it opens on the last wave? When you shoot at the "shield tower" it will activate a temp shield around the base to protect it from the Boss Tanks shots. 
Happy gaming!

reviews.review_description: Loved the first and this is better - superb tower defence game . This is a must purchase. A steal for the price .

developer_response.body: Thank you for the kindness and support, stay tuned for more updates . Happy gaming!

reviews.review_description: I.G Salvation improves on the original and keeps you coming back for more!

Review after finishing all 30 levels in hard. 

Definitely a nice upgrade from the original. Textures have much more detail, animations are smoother, backgrounds have a lot more going on, and are genuinely pretty at times. 
Moving the platforms adds a fun extra element of strategy, and being able to hold down the shoot button is a massive quality of life improvement (my index finger still hurts from the first game). 

A little lacking in replayability, outside of the 3 difficulties, no reason to ever go back to a level. Plus it doesn't even track what difficulty you cleared a level on, so you just have to remember if you are a completionist.

A few bugs as well, sometimes the teleporting move would bug out, and instead of moving to the cursor, you just start teleporting left to right randomly.
Also towers would occasionally not become unjammed after the jammer was destroyed, and would be uninteractable for the rest of level. Only a restart would fix it. 

After some patches, and maybe a new mode or challenges are added. Game will be perfect!
Still a solid recommended even in it current state.

developer_response.body:
Hi, thank you for the kind review, we have addressed most of these issues , please check v0.858 update. 
Best.

reviews.review_description:
Love the new game, and the extra elements of the on-field gameplay. As already mentioned, the 'mistakenly sell' turrets issue is annoying but has already been acknowledged by the developers for a fix. 
Level 10 (crab/spider boss) - I've had a couple of instances where the wave finishes, but no button appears to activate the next wave, so essentially you're stuck and the level has to be manually restarted. 
Also, on that same level, the boss shield stays on permanently, despite the generator being destroyed meaning that the boss cannot be beaten. Again, had to restart a couple of times to avoid this glitch. 

So, whilst not perfect, overall still a great game.

developer_response.body:
Hi, Pls update to latest patch v0.858, many issues should be resolved.  
Feel free to join us on discord, the  devs will be happy to discuss any further issues. 
https://xlabdigital.com/discord
Best!

reviews.review_description: It's a guessing game. There is no documentation, and no way to reach support. Another half-finished game from this company.

developer_response.body:
Hi there, sorry you ran into issues! You can view all control mappings under Settings → Controls. 
For questions or support, please reach us at info@xlabdigital.com or join our community  at https://xlabdigital.com/discord  , our team and players are happy to help., as it's not clear what docs specifically are you looking for. 
Appreciate the feedback!

reviews.review_description: I didn't expect such a small team to be able to make such a cool product. Respect to everyone who took part. I was really looking forward to the sequel and the second part didn't disappoint me. Of course there are bugs, but in our time it's normal and I don't think it's worth lowering the ratings because of this, because the developers will definitely fix it all. Keep it up, boys!

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your patience and consideration.  We have our first patch out v0.840 with many fixes. We'll continue to polish and make this game stronger.  
Best

reviews.review_description:
Amazing game, just finished the campaign. I can't believe only 120 people finished the game at this moment (according to the scoreboard). This game and its predecessor deserve a lot more attention.

I loved the fact i had to rethink some strategies in order to proceed.

Some suggestions:
- more settings to disable/enable aircraft and portal vehicles
- gui indicators for when a level is finished in easy, normal or hard. Must be nice to see everything completed.
- some kind of endless mode please!
- make zoom out to 200% possible
- maybe add an indicator per level if the secret has been found 

I will be playing more in the next few days and might add more suggestions.

Thank you for an amazing game.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your support and kind review. We are planning to add more options in the setting menu, also will share your suggestions with the other devs. 
Happy gaming!

reviews.review_description: I would already have been very happy with just some new levels but this is next level tower defense. More challenging dynamics and options. I love it and can't wait for a level pack of some kind. Please make it happen and don't let us wait for 5 years again

developer_response.body:
Thank you for the kind review,  will share your suggestion with the other devs, I'm sure everyone will appreciate it. 
Best!

reviews.review_description: They have done it again! Whether you enjoyed the first game or are new to the game you will love this.

developer_response.body: Thank you for the kind words. Best!

reviews.review_description:
EDIT.   Fast response from the developers , well done.  The boundary issue mentioned below ( left in review for context of this edit), has been fixed and all within a few days of my review. A five star game for me. 

Always liked a tower defense game and enjoyed the previous two Ironguards.  Great new graphics, added bonus of hidden things to discover, heroes add a new dimension.  One slight grumble though.  When reaching the play area boundary the screen goes black, found it very disorientating and it force drops anything you were repositioning  meaning you lose time picking it up again and moving it.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your support and kind review. 
Best!

reviews.review_description:
Big fan of the first iron guard, but this?, why is there option to change settings when it does nothing?, I really hate snap view and narrowing down view field while moving, the options is there to change it, but you can't change the options, nothing happens when trying to change, also, changing music / voice / effect levels does change, and opening the menu directly after they are where you set them, when completing an level, the options is reset, but biggest problem right now is that I can't play the game with forced snap view and narrowing down the viewfield while moving, it makes me dizzy as hell (kinda works in the opposite way for me..)

Fix it! I want to play!!!

Update:
And they fixed it! :-D love it so far, just as good as the first iron guard, if not better

4/5 because there really could be improvments with the gui while playing, like the cost of towers is with white text on brigth background, you have to be extremly close to see what it says

Also, som additional information when upgrading towers beyond level 3, the rocket tower as example, when upgrading to hammer i think it's called, I'd love to have some short info, this tower no longer attacks flying enemies, it's hard to remember all effect on the towers

And the arrows indicating the path of enemies could also be a bit darker as it's hard to see when you look to far away, maybe let us choose colour within the options for all of this?

If this get implemented or changed, the game will absolutley get 5/5 from me

developer_response.body: Hi, glad you're enjoying the game, thanks for the feedback.  Yes, some of these UI items will be polished and updated in the coming patches . Best!

reviews.review_description: not good. wanted my money back but didnt know about request refund . cell phone game cool.....vr not cool

developer_response.body:
Hi, are you looking at the right game, we don't have a cell phone game, please check.
Also, all refunds are handled by Meta we as developers don't have any control on refunds.
Would appreciate more info and an opportunity to help  if it's indeed our game that is causing any issues. 
Thank you

reviews.review_title: Could be the best TD, but...
reviews.review_description:
...if easy mode becomes insane after level 20, it is simply frustrating and gets deleted. 
Thx for beautiful 20/30 levels. I will check the game next year again probably. For now frustration has killed joy.

developer_response.body:
Update: not sure if you're stuck on 20, but on level 20 the Boss on the last wave shoots at the base. Make sure you shoot at the "shield tower" located near the base with your drone, to activate the shield and protect the base from the Boss attack.  

Hi, sorry to hear you got stuck after level 20. If you’d like, please join us on our Discord https://xlabdigital.com/discord where we’d be happy to help out. 
The game’s difficulty is mathematically balanced to stay engaging across various levels and playmodes, but without knowing what upgrades you’ve chosen or where you’re finding it tough, it’s hard for us to pinpoint what might be causing the block. 
Many players have completed all 30 levels even on Hard mode, but of course, balancing for every players style and skill level is always a challenge. We’d love to hear more about your experience so we can better understand where things feel off for you.

reviews.review_title: Solid game, glad I tried it.
reviews.review_description: This game is a lot of fun, the controls are easy, haven’t experienced any bugs and I’m halfway through, it actually requires real strategy and planning, and the devs added fun mechanics to the game that don’t overwhelm you but actually add to the experience. I definitely recommend trying it out!

developer_response.body:
Thank you, glad you're enjoying the game. 
Best!

reviews.review_description:
Edit quick response from the developers to fix the annoying little bits five stars thanks.

I love this kind of game and I loved the first one. I definitely feels like an upgrade from the first one, there is a good amount of content for the price and I would definitely recommend it if you like tower defence games. There are a few problems but none which can’t be fixed. One is the smooth turn feature you turn it on and it works but if you restart or start a new level you have to turn it off and on again to make it work bit annoying. The other one is some time in the heat of battle you can accidentally sell your turrets but you learn to stay away from them a bit and it it’s fine still a great game.￼ will be happy to give five stars with fixes.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for the kind review.  
Best!

reviews.review_title: I can't tell you why this game is addict
reviews.review_description:
Because the game is kinda bad.

There's very little depth to the game, but that's fine not every TD needs to have that, it's the problems that drag it down.

Upgrades - encourages reseting for what you need but resets everything making new points allocation tedious. Also not going into base defence because I didn't need it just auto loses you the game on the 2nd boss.

Controls - they are bad, you have seen people complain about the accidental selling. Also I find you can't shoot with the drone as it gets stuck on priority target applying.

Story - it's bad, delivered poorly with disjointed mission briefs and then awkward AI voices.

But it's cheap and I'm going back to play it so...

developer_response.body:
Hi, pls update to latest patch . The turret issue is resolved along with many other small fixes. The control should behave closer to the original game with added flexibility for auto drone, etc. 
Also, we haven't used any AI in the game, the voice acting credits are available at the end, and the vo  has been modulated by software only

reviews.review_description:
If you enjoyed the first outing, you will find this great fun to play.

Unfortunately it is a bit buggy but hopefully things get fixed in patches. Bonus cans sometimes drift into space or fall through the floor. I had a superweapon just leave the big green target and never fired or could be used again. The height resets in a weird way after pausing to go to the Meta menus. I found on level 29 the hero doesn't always follow instruction to move. And it's a bit jarring when you accidentally leave the map and get a black screen with 'Go back'. And on a Quest 3 the framerate drops when there's too much action which is ok for 2d but really bad in VR.

But overall it's a great upgrade on the first game: the addition of heroes, more choice on weapon placement and new baddies are all great.

developer_response.body:
Thanks for the feedback! Are you on v0.840? That patch fixed the black screen/out-of-bounds and height issues. We’ll check the hero locomotion, if you can share which hero or a quick clip, that’d help. Pls join us on Discord so our devs can also help further https://xlabdigital.com/discord/
Best!

reviews.review_description:
Fantastic Game 5 star. Because I know you're working on a patch that others have mentioned.  Just love the extra features added to this game . Look forward to the patch. Great work Devs
UPDATE .  THE PATCH IS OUT. And yes they have sorted the game out much much better now!!!!. Thanks.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for the kind review and support. 
Best!

reviews.review_description:
I played the 1st game and now this. It's a great game, however there are some small bugs. When you switch the turning option to "smooth", it resets every new level, and you have to go to the options screen again to switch it.

Game just got released so I understand if they have to work out the kinks.

Great game! Hope they come put with new levels and what not in the future.

developer_response.body:
Hello, please update to latest patch v0.858, lot's of quality of life fixes. 
Thank you.
  
Feel free to join us on discord if you need more tips and info https://xlabdigital.com/discord

reviews.review_description: Loved the idea that I could start over on upgrades till I got everything I wanted and have almost 3000 to spare only playing easy and each level only once. I replayed levels for days on the 1st one to get upgrades. Yes its the easy setting but game beat in 3 days without a bot touching a base? Then ther is no indication which difficulty each level is played/beaten in, it just shows stars across all difficulties. Then it jumps to the highest beaten level after you play losing your spot when you're trying to replay in the next difficulty which is feeling pointless since I have all upgrades and have no stars/goals to work towards. Flying bots glitch. The blackness at edges is ridiculous. Found secrets that show and do nothing, what's that? Waited months for what seems to be a game demo in beta.

developer_response.body:
Hi, pls update to latest patch 
Once all secrets are collected it unlocks an achievement,  the border issue is fixed along with last played level now displayed on missions map, and many others. 
Please join us on discord and the devs will be happy to discuss and resolve issues.  
https://xlabdigital.com/discord
Best regards

reviews.review_description: Given the price point and the amount of content you get, this is an easy 5 stars. Nice game and it shows how well tower defence can work in VR. There are various improvements over the original including boss fights, movable platforms, and some beautiful environments. As with the original, the difficulty seems inconsistent, with some levels providing a challenge and others easily beaten. The only rival on Quest would be "Towers and Powers", which may still have greater strategic depth.

developer_response.body:
Thank you. More updates and fixes just released in v0.840.
Happy gaming !

reviews.review_title: A Nice Upgrade to the Original
reviews.review_description:
Updated review. Main aunch day issues resolved quickly.
I loved the first game, and this one didn't disappoint.  
Still has the feel of the original but gives one more tactical flexibility with the characters and selectable turret positions, all for the price of a movie ticket.

Thank you for your feedback and kind review. 
Best!

The game. Please sort this out.??

reviews.review_title: Some early bugs but definitely upgrade
reviews.review_description:
Hello.  Hoping devs see this.  Game is great for those others wanting a review.  If u lile TDs ull love this.

Devs-game doesn't stay in smooth mode.  Defaults to angle turns between games (including losing and restarting same level).  My fix is to go to settings, unclick and reclick smooth and hit the "controls" button a few times.  Once done smooth turn engages.

When drone is in free fly mode it says to "use grip" but that doesn't work for me.  The drone "with all upgrades" is completely autonomous.  Issue with this is how do u shoot random creep drops.  I can't even assign the hero to shoot the drop.  Id have to un learn the drone talent to be able to manually blow up and use random drops. 

Only 24hrs into playing will update with any other issues found.

developer_response.body:
Hello, thank you for the feedback.  Yes, the smooth rotation along with many other things are fixed in v0.858, pls update.

To recall drone if it's far away on the map, double press the grip to summon it in your hand.  If it's close to your hand (left/right) you can reach out grab with grip just like picking up objects in vr usually.  

Hope this helps. Feel free to join us on discord for more tips and tricks or discussions with players and devs. 
Happy Gaming !

reviews.review_title: Great game but need some improvments
reviews.review_description:
I have played for about an hour and got dizzy after that, i have seen that when i move on the map that i am having thr locomotion option you hqve enabled but it moves so fast it got me dizzy,
Please qdd an option to move around the map slower.
Ty
